name: Oven Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from the beef.
2. Place the trimmed steak in a freezer until firm.
3. Slice the steak into thin strips.
4. Place the slices in a large shallow bowl.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (liquid smoke, black pepper, salt, soy sauce, red pepper flakes) and mix well.
6. Pour the marinade over the beef, making sure each piece is coated.
7. Weight down the pieces with a plate to ensure they are fully submerged in the marinade.
8. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours.
9. Drain the steak well and pat dry with a clean towel.
10. Arrange the drained strips onto a rack in a single layer.
11. Place the rack in a shallow baking pan.
12. Bake at 250°F (121°C) for 3-4 hours, or until the jerky is dry to the touch. Remove from the oven and allow it to air dry for an additional 24 hours.
13. Store the finished jerky in a tightly covered glass jar.
14. Serve at room temperature.
